question: What is the canonical product name?
context: The repository and canonical documents used the shorter Denet spelling while the repository name and owner intent use Dennett.

options.description: Keep Denet as the canonical product name
costs: contradicts owner intent and repository identity

options.description: Use Dennett as the canonical product name
benefits: matches owner intent and repository identity
costs: requires a repository-wide mechanical rename before implementation expands
risks: broken links or identifiers if the rename is incomplete

reason: The owner explicitly confirmed Dennett on 2026-07-16.

resolution.note: Normalize active documentation, public identifiers and repository metadata before implementation grows.
